meaning: n.(从上向下看物体的)平面图,俯视图
examples: Planform alignment is impossible to assess until in flight imagery becomes available.
611 institute (Chengdu Aircraft Design institute) initiated studied on the "tailless delta-canard" wing planform as early as the late 1960s.
We use shades of gray to outline maps and to outline the aircraft planform shown on various subsystem formats, such as fuel, flight controls, and weapons.
